calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:45am
Small Claims appeals, Judge Pro Tem Robert Stump, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber.
Cause called for small claims appeals. Dean Oshida, Executive Director, appears as representative for the appellant Indochinese Housing Development Corp. Sally Morin, Esq. appears for Appellant. Robert L. Jordon, Respondent, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Ms. Morin lodges a trial brief
EXHR(A) Statement re paid rent
10:00am
Evidence is retained. Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Judgment Entered
